title: ClaimSpec v0
description: Canonical schema for claims, lineage events, actors, and disclosure. See spec.md for normative rationale.

claimspec.description: Spec version this document conforms to.

conformance.description: The conformance tier this document declares (see spec.md §8).

Register.description: What grounds the confidence. record = constitutive (may be 1.0, WORM); inference = empirical ((0,1) forever, revisable).

ClaimType.description: Open/extensible. Core ontology listed; domain vocabularies may extend.

Agency.description: Responsibility axis (EU AI Act Art. 50). Projected from events; per-artifact AI-involvement is the sticky-upward disjunction over the closure.

Claim.description: A unit of knowledge with a confidence and a register. See spec.md §2-§5.

confidence.description: How sure (0..1). An inference MUST be < 1.0 (see allOf).

content.description: Domain payload; opaque to the spec.

superseded_by.description: Claim id that supersedes this one (records supersede, never edit).

^x-.$comment: Extension namespace (spec.md §11). Implementations MAY add x-<vendor> keys; validators ignore them; non-authoritative for conformance.

allOf.$comment: NORMATIVE INVARIANT (spec.md §3): an inference can never be certain.

EventFamily.description: Behavioural family of the act. spec.md §6.2.

Event.description: One act that happened — the append-only ledger that IS the truth. spec.md §6.

type.description: Specific act type within the family (e.g. 'observed', 'inferred', 'superseded', 'egress_disclosed').

review_ref.description: Human-control / review record id (EU AI Act Art. 50(4)); unions into Disclosure.sources at egress. spec.md §6.4, §7.

Actor.description: Who acted — three orthogonal axes. spec.md §6.4.

Disclosure.description: Egress read-model: the closure-walk projection for a published artifact. spec.md §7.

ai_involved.description: Disjunction of agency over the closure; sticky-upward.

external_marks.description: Union of external marks across the closure.

sources.description: Union of cited sources / review refs (Art. 12 / Art. 50(4)).
